text: [Table: coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length of the lens measured in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum (most open) F-number supported by the lens | f_no_max: Maximum (most closed) F-number supported by the lens | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion value expressed as a percentage | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio supported | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio supported

[Table: coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance between the lens front element and the object/target surface, measured in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance ratio or total conjugate distance | flange_distance: Distance from the camera mounting flange to the image sensor plane, measured in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text describing the camera mount type (e.g., C-mount, F-mount, M42)
[Table: coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue sales price of the lens | weight_g: Physical weight of the lens body in grams

[Table: coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: What are the focal length, working distance, and weight of all coaxial illumination line scan lenses? Engineering Reasoning: Select the identifying column and the three requested specification columns. No filtering needed — return all rows. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, wd_mm, weight_g
FROM coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens;

[Table: coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which coaxial illumination line scan lenses support a maximum image size of at least 43 mm and use a C-mount? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `max_image_size_value` for large sensor coverage. Filter `mount_raw` for C-mount compatibility. SQL: SELECT model_name, max_image_size_value, mount_raw
FROM coaxial_illumination_line_scan_lens
WHERE max_image_size_value >= 43
  AND mount_raw ILIKE '%C%';

[Table: line_scan_lens_12k5u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length of the lens measured in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (maximum aperture) of the lens | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (minimum aperture) of the lens | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion value expressed as a percentage | fov_mm: Field of view measured in millimeters | magnification_min: Minimum supported optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum supported optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at the edge of the image field, expressed as a percentage of center illuminance

[Table: line_scan_lens_12k5u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from the lens to the target object surface in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance or total conjugate ratio | flange_distance: Flange-to-sensor distance on the camera side in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text describing the lens mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text describing the filter thread size and pitch

[Table: line_scan_lens_12k5u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue sales price of the lens | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter of the lens body in millimeters | size_length_min_mm: Minimum physical length of the lens body in millimeters | weight_g: Physical weight of the lens body in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_12k5u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: List all 12K 5µm line scan lenses with their focal length, working distance, and list price. Engineering Reasoning: Retrieve the three requested columns plus the identifier. No filtering — return all models. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, wd_mm, list_price
FROM line_scan_lens_12k5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_12k5u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 12K 5µm lenses have a filter thread and support a maximum image size of at least 60 mm? Engineering Reasoning: Filter on `filter_thread_raw` for non-null filter thread availability. Filter on `max_image_size_value` for large sensor coverage. SQL: SELECT model_name, filter_thread_raw, max_image_size_value
FROM line_scan_lens_12k5u
WHERE filter_thread_raw IS NOT NULL
  AND max_image_size_value >= 60;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length of the lens in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (smallest aperture) | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion value in percent | fov_degrees: Field of view expressed in degrees | fov_mm: Field of view expressed in millimeters | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at field edge as percentage of center

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens front to target in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance or total conjugate distance | flange_distance: Lens flange to image sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text for camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text for filter thread specification

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue sales price | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter of the lens in millimeters | size_length_mm: Physical length of the lens body in millimeters | weight_g: Weight of the lens in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: Show all 16K 3.5µm lenses with their focal length, angular field of view, and price. Engineering Reasoning: Select `focus_length_mm`, `fov_degrees`, and `list_price` alongside `model_name`. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, fov_degrees, list_price
FROM line_scan_lens_16k3_5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 16K 3.5µm lenses support sensors larger than 55 mm and have a filter thread available? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `max_image_size_value` for large format sensor coverage. Filter `filter_thread_raw` for non-null values indicating filter support. SQL: SELECT model_name, max_image_size_value, filter_thread_raw
FROM line_scan_lens_16k3_5u
WHERE max_image_size_value > 55
  AND filter_thread_raw IS NOT NULL;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k3_5u] Query Type: Ambiguous Engineering Terminology. Natural Language: What is the difference between "fov_degrees" and "fov_mm" — show both for all models. Engineering Reasoning: `fov_degrees` is angular field of view; `fov_mm` is linear field of view at the object plane. Retrieving both side by side clarifies the relationship. SQL: SELECT model_name, fov_degrees, fov_mm
FROM line_scan_lens_16k3_5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length of the lens in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (smallest aperture) | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion in percent | fov_degrees: Field of view in degrees (angular) | fov_mm: Field of view in millimeters (linear) at the object plane | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens front to target in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance / total conjugate | flange_distance: Camera flange to sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text of camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text of filter thread size/pitch

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue price of the lens | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter of the lens in millimeters | weight_g: Weight of the lens in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: List all 16K 5µm line scan lenses with their focal length, field of view in degrees, and weight. Engineering Reasoning: Select the four relevant columns for all models. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, fov_degrees, weight_g
FROM line_scan_lens_16k5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 16K 5µm lenses support F-numbers below 4 and have a maximum image size above 60 mm? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `f_no_min` for fast aperture lenses. Filter `max_image_size_value` for large sensor coverage. SQL: SELECT model_name, f_no_min, max_image_size_value
FROM line_scan_lens_16k5u
WHERE f_no_min < 4
  AND max_image_size_value > 60;

[Table: line_scan_lens_16k5u] Query Type: Ambiguous Engineering Terminology. Natural Language: What is "flange distance" and how does it compare to working distance for these lenses? Engineering Reasoning: `flange_distance` is the camera-side optical distance (lens flange to image sensor). `wd_mm` is the object-side distance (lens front to target). Showing both reveals the full optical conjugate layout. SQL: SELECT model_name, wd_mm, flange_distance
FROM line_scan_lens_16k5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_4k7u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number or limit value | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion in percent | fov_mm: Field of view in millimeters | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at image field edge as percentage

[Table: line_scan_lens_4k7u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens to object in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance or total conjugate | flange_distance: Camera flange to image sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text of camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text of filter thread specification

[Table: line_scan_lens_4k7u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue price | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter in millimeters | size_length_min_mm: Minimum physical length of the lens in millimeters | weight_g: Physical weight of the lens in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_4k7u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: Show all 4K 7µm line scan lenses with focal length, working distance, and field of view. Engineering Reasoning: Select `focus_length_mm`, `wd_mm`, and `fov_mm` for all models. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, wd_mm, fov_mm
FROM line_scan_lens_4k7u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_4k7u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 4K 7µm lenses support a sensor image size of 29 mm or larger and have a filter thread? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `max_image_size_value` and `filter_thread_raw` for combined compatibility check. SQL: SELECT model_name, max_image_size_value, filter_thread_raw
FROM line_scan_lens_4k7u
WHERE max_image_size_value >= 29
  AND filter_thread_raw IS NOT NULL;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k5u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (smallest aperture) | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion in percent | fov_mm: Field of view in millimeters (linear) | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at field edge as percentage of center

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k5u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens to target in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance or total conjugate | flange_distance: Camera flange to sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text of camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text of filter thread specification

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k5u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue price | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter in millimeters | size_length_min_mm: Minimum physical length of the lens in millimeters | weight_g: Physical weight in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k5u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: List all 8K 5µm lenses with focal length, standard magnification, and list price. Engineering Reasoning: Retrieve three specification columns and the model identifier. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, standard_magnification, list_price
FROM line_scan_lens_8k5u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k5u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 8K 5µm lenses have a diameter under 60 mm and support a filter thread? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `size_diameter_mm` for compact form factor. Filter `filter_thread_raw` for filter support. SQL: SELECT model_name, size_diameter_mm, filter_thread_raw
FROM line_scan_lens_8k5u
WHERE size_diameter_mm < 60
  AND filter_thread_raw IS NOT NULL;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (smallest aperture) | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion in percent | fov_mm: Field of view in millimeters (linear) at object plane | fov_degrees: Field of view in degrees (angular) | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at field edge as percentage of center

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens front to object in millimeters | o_i: Object-to-image distance or total conjugate | flange_distance: Camera flange to sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text of camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text of filter thread specification

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue price | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter in millimeters | size_length_min_mm: Minimum physical length of the lens in millimeters | weight_g: Physical weight in grams

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: List all 8K 7µm lenses with focal length, angular field of view, and flange distance. Engineering Reasoning: Select the key specification columns for all models. SQL: SELECT model_name, focus_length_mm, fov_degrees, flange_distance
FROM line_scan_lens_8k7u;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Query Type: Attribute Filtering. Natural Language: Find 8K 7µm lenses with an outer diameter of 60 mm or less and weight under 400 g. Engineering Reasoning: Filter `size_diameter_mm` and `weight_g` for compact, lightweight options. SQL: SELECT model_name, size_diameter_mm, weight_g
FROM line_scan_lens_8k7u
WHERE size_diameter_mm <= 60
  AND weight_g < 400;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Query Type: Compatibility Reasoning. Natural Language: Which 8K 7µm lenses have a maximum F-number above 16 and support sensor sizes larger than 40 mm? Engineering Reasoning: Filter `f_no_max` for lenses with a wide aperture range. Filter `max_image_size_value` for large sensor coverage. SQL: SELECT model_name, f_no_max, max_image_size_value
FROM line_scan_lens_8k7u
WHERE f_no_max > 16
  AND max_image_size_value > 40;

[Table: line_scan_lens_8k7u] Query Type: Ambiguous Engineering Terminology. Natural Language: What is "o_i" in this table and how does it relate to total lens track length? Engineering Reasoning: `o_i` is the object-to-image distance (total conjugate distance), representing the full optical path from object to image sensor. `flange_distance` represents only the camera-side portion. Comparing `o_i` vs. `wd_mm + flange_distance` reveals internal lens element spacing. SQL: SELECT model_name, o_i, wd_mm, flange_distance
FROM line_scan_lens_8k7u;

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Optical Attributes: focus_length_mm: Focal length in millimeters | f_no_min: Minimum F-number (widest aperture) | f_no_max: Maximum F-number (smallest aperture) | tv_distortion_percent: TV distortion in percent | fov_degrees: Field of view in degrees (angular) | magnification_min: Minimum optical magnification ratio | magnification_max: Maximum optical magnification ratio | relative_illuminance_percent: Relative illuminance at field edge as percentage of center

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Conjugate & Mount Attributes: wd_mm: Working distance from lens to target in millimeters | flange_distance: Camera flange to sensor distance in millimeters | mount_raw: Raw text of camera mount type | filter_thread_raw: Raw text of filter thread specification

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Dimension Attributes: list_price: Catalogue price | size_diameter_mm: Physical outer diameter in millimeters | size_length_min_mm: Minimum physical length of the lens in millimeters | weight_g: Physical weight in grams

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Query Type: Specification Lookup. Natural Language: Show all new series 4K 7µm lenses with their angular field of view and standard magnification. Engineering Reasoning: Select `fov_degrees` and `standard_magnification` alongside the identifier. SQL: SELECT model_name, fov_degrees, standard_magnification
FROM new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u;

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Query Type: Attribute Filtering. Natural Language: Find new series 4K 7µm lenses with relative illuminance greater than 55% and TV distortion below 0.1%. Engineering Reasoning: Combined filter on `relative_illuminance_percent` and `tv_distortion_percent`. SQL: SELECT model_name, relative_illuminance_percent, tv_distortion_percent
FROM new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u
WHERE relative_illuminance_percent > 55
  AND tv_distortion_percent < 0.1;

[Table: new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u] Query Type: Ambiguous Engineering Terminology. Natural Language: How does this new series compare to the original 4K 7µm series on maximum aperture (f_no_min)? Engineering Reasoning: The original `line_scan_lens_4k7u` also has `f_no_min`. Joining or unioning the two on `f_no_min` enables a cross-generation aperture comparison. SQL: SELECT 'original' AS series, model_name, f_no_min
FROM line_scan_lens_4k7u
UNION ALL
SELECT 'new_series' AS series, model_name, f_no_min
FROM new_series_line_scan_lens_4k7u
ORDER BY f_no_min;
